hook.summary: A woman models a stylish brown suede jacket for a spring fashion look.
hook.visual_action: The woman buttons up a brown suede jacket while wearing a patterned headscarf and blue jeans against a neutral background.

scene_flow: Introduction of the brown suede jacket with a close-up of the woman buttoning it.
The model turns to show the back and side profile of the jacket.
The model poses with her hands in her pockets, smiling at the camera.
Final full-body shot showcasing the complete spring outfit.
audience_proxy: Fashion-forward women aged 25-45 looking for seasonal styling inspiration.
